title: Cart-to-Purchase Conversion by Acquisition Channel

landmines.name: duplicate-events-inflate
landmines.kills: Counting event rows per stage (rather than distinct sessions) lets a double-fired add_to_cart count twice, inflating the denominator and understating conversion. Kills naive/1_count_rows_double_fire.sql.

landmines.name: anonymous-dropped
landmines.kills: An INNER JOIN of events to customers discards sessions with NULL customer_id (anonymous), stripping the unknown bucket of anonymous traffic. Kills naive/2_innerjoin_drops_anonymous.sql.

landmines.name: null-channel-bucket
landmines.kills: NULL acquisition_channel (and anonymous sessions) must collapse into a single labelled 'unknown' group via COALESCE, not be filtered out or split; a WHERE channel NOT IN (...) or GROUP BY on the raw NULL mishandles them.

notes: Stage membership is computed per session (MAX(CASE ...)) so duplicate events collapse before counting. Anonymous (NULL customer) and NULL-channel customers both map to 'unknown' via COALESCE and a LEFT JOIN. 1.0* division is portable across engines.
